news.title:
Ashiana Housing faces a Rs 4.96L GST demand in Jaipur over input tax credit issues.
The demand pertains to Ashiana Umang Phase IV; company to contest and assess impact.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing faces a Rs 4.96L GST demand in Jaipur over input tax credit issues.
The demand pertains to Ashiana Umang Phase IV; company to contest and assess impact.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd postponed its EGM to 22nd April 2026, citing unavoidable circumstances.
EGM will address the appointment of Vikas Choudhury as an Independent Director with Rs. 8 lakh annual remuneration.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd postponed its EGM to 22nd April 2026, citing unavoidable circumstances.
EGM will address the appointment of Vikas Choudhury as an Independent Director with Rs. 8 lakh annual remuneration.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing cancels earlier lease agreement with Caroa Properties for Panvel land.
New agreements include sale of 6.02 acres and lease of 1.03 acres for Senior Living project.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing cancels earlier lease agreement with Caroa Properties for Panvel land.
New agreements include sale of 6.02 acres and lease of 1.03 acres for Senior Living project.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd announces 6th April 2026 for part redemption, interest payment on NCDs.
Record date is 17th March 2026; payment contingent on distributable surplus per trust deed.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd announces 6th April 2026 for part redemption, interest payment on NCDs.
Record date is 17th March 2026; payment contingent on distributable surplus per trust deed.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd reported strong pre-sales visibility, improving ROE, and focused execution in its investor meet.
The firm leads in senior living with 9 consecutive years as India's No.1 brand, targeting 25% pre-sales from this segment by FY26.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd reported strong pre-sales visibility, improving ROE, and focused execution in its investor meet.
The firm leads in senior living with 9 consecutive years as India's No.1 brand, targeting 25% pre-sales from this segment by FY26.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 FY26 sales rose to INR 397 crore from INR 303 crore in Q2.
FY26 presales crossed INR 2,000 crore; PAT doubled to INR 56.7 crore, driven by new projects.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 FY26 sales rose to INR 397 crore from INR 303 crore in Q2.
FY26 presales crossed INR 2,000 crore; PAT doubled to INR 56.7 crore, driven by new projects.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing updates interim dividend record date to Thursday from Friday.
No changes in dividend details; clarification ensures accurate shareholder info.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing updates interim dividend record date to Thursday from Friday.
No changes in dividend details; clarification ensures accurate shareholder info.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing appoints Mr. Vikas Choudhury as Independent Director for 3 years, subject to shareholder approval.
Mr. Choudhury, ex-Reliance Jio President, brings expertise in digital transformation and investments in 75+ companies.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing appoints Mr. Vikas Choudhury as Independent Director for 3 years, subject to shareholder approval.
Mr. Choudhury, ex-Reliance Jio President, brings expertise in digital transformation and investments in 75+ companies.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 net profit rose to ₹567M, up from ₹109M YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to ₹3.6B from ₹1.3B YoY, reflecting strong growth.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 net profit rose to ₹567M, up from ₹109M YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to ₹3.6B from ₹1.3B YoY, reflecting strong growth.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing converted 242 units of Ashiana Aaroham Phase 1 & 2 to bookings.
5.03 lakh sq.ft booked for INR 767.2 crore; FY value exceeds INR 2,000 crore.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing converted 242 units of Ashiana Aaroham Phase 1 & 2 to bookings.
5.03 lakh sq.ft booked for INR 767.2 crore; FY value exceeds INR 2,000 crore.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd will host Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call on 12th Feb 2026, 4-5 PM IST.
The company specializes in Comfort Homes, Active Senior Living, and Assisted Living solutions.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd will host Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call on 12th Feb 2026, 4-5 PM IST.
The company specializes in Comfort Homes, Active Senior Living, and Assisted Living solutions.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd acquires 8.83 acres in Pune for a Senior Living project.
The project will have a saleable area of approximately 4.5 lakh sq. ft.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd acquires 8.83 acres in Pune for a Senior Living project.
The project will have a saleable area of approximately 4.5 lakh sq. ft.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing paid INR 4.5 Cr on Jan 22, 2026, for NCD interest, partial redemption, and premium.
Interest of INR 1.05 Cr and partial redemption of INR 86.03 L with INR 2.58 Cr premium paid.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing paid INR 4.5 Cr on Jan 22, 2026, for NCD interest, partial redemption, and premium.
Interest of INR 1.05 Cr and partial redemption of INR 86.03 L with INR 2.58 Cr premium paid.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing's GST audit (FY 2020-24) found issues costing ₹24.6L, including penalties.
The company paid ₹16.6L in taxes and will pay the rest after verification.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing's GST audit (FY 2020-24) found issues costing ₹24.6L, including penalties.
The company paid ₹16.6L in taxes and will pay the rest after verification.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd announces interest payment on NCDs with ISIN INE365D07085.
Record date is 29th Jan 2026; payment of Rs. 3.1 Cr will be made on 13th Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd announces interest payment on NCDs with ISIN INE365D07085.
Record date is 29th Jan 2026; payment of Rs. 3.1 Cr will be made on 13th Feb 2026.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 FY26 bookings fell to 5.56 lakh sq.ft from 6.77 lakh in Q3 FY25.
Q3 FY26 sales value dropped to ₹401.1 Cr vs ₹454.2 Cr, with 357 units sold vs 451 units.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing's Q3 FY26 bookings fell to 5.56 lakh sq.ft from 6.77 lakh in Q3 FY25.
Q3 FY26 sales value dropped to ₹401.1 Cr vs ₹454.2 Cr, with 357 units sold vs 451 units.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing opened 6.78% higher on 9 Jan 2026, showing strong sentiment.
The gap-up indicates positivity in realty despite broader market challenges.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing opened 6.78% higher on 9 Jan 2026, showing strong sentiment.
The gap-up indicates positivity in realty despite broader market challenges.

news.title:
GST Dept Jaipur raised a demand of ₹1.29 cr on Ashiana Housing for wrong ITC claims.
The company plans to contest the order; no major financial impact observed.
news.summary:
GST Dept Jaipur raised a demand of ₹1.29 cr on Ashiana Housing for wrong ITC claims.
The company plans to contest the order; no major financial impact observed.

news.title:
Ashiana Housing Ltd. announces part redemption/interest payment on NCDs (ISIN: INE365D08034) on 22nd January 2026.
Record date for redemption/interest payment is 6th January 2026; payment depends on distributable surplus as per trust deed.
news.summary:
Ashiana Housing Ltd. announces part redemption/interest payment on NCDs (ISIN: INE365D08034) on 22nd January 2026.
Record date for redemption/interest payment is 6th January 2026; payment depends on distributable surplus as per trust deed.

news.title:
Delhi GST Dept raised a ₹48.45 lakh demand on Ashiana Housing for underdeclared tax credit reversals.
The company plans to contest the order; no significant financial impact reported yet.
news.summary:
Delhi GST Dept raised a ₹48.45 lakh demand on Ashiana Housing for underdeclared tax credit reversals.
The company plans to contest the order; no significant financial impact reported yet.
